name: icskills
description: Agent-readable skill files for the Internet Computer

scripts.generate: node scripts/generate-skills.js && node scripts/generate-llms-full.js && node scripts/generate-llms.js && node scripts/generate-agent-json.js

scripts.build: npm run validate && npm run generate && vite build && node scripts/generate-skill-pages.js && node scripts/generate-sitemap.js
